title: BEM-840 post secret smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 07:12 (UTC+3)'
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_post_secret_claude_smoke.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-840 | POST SECRET CLAUDE SMOKE REQUEST'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Context: operator updated ANTHROPIC_API_KEY repository secret. Please perform a minimal internal auditor response.'+sep+sep+'Required output: create a real response in governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_response.md'+sep+sep+'Response requirements:'+sep+'- Start with: CLAUDE RESPONSE'+sep+'- Include: DECISION: APPROVED or DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED or DECISION: BLOCKED'+sep+'- Explain whether runtime/provider works after secret update.'+sep+'- No issue comments.'+sep)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_dispatch_post_secret.json')
queue.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 post ANTHROPIC_API_KEY update Claude smoke','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'post_secret_claude_smoke_queued','mailbox_request':str(mail),'queue_file':str(queue),'expected':['workflow_dispatch_results status','claude runtime state','real claude response bem840_claude_response.md'],'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_post_secret_claude_smoke.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_post_secret_claude_smoke.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Post Secret Claude Smoke | QUEUED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick and verify dispatch result, runtime state, real Claude response. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Post-secret Claude smoke queued. Next: tick and verify proof triad.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(mail),str(queue),'governance/state/bem840_post_secret_claude_smoke.json','governance/reports/bem840_post_secret_claude_smoke.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Queued a fresh Claude internal auditor smoke after operator updated ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and wrote an explicit mailbox request for a real Claude response')
"""
No issue comments.
